message:
The other day, I was in the kitchen whipping up dinner when I suddenly remembered the smoke alarm chirp from last week. You know, the one that always seems to go off when you’re just about to serve the good stuff? I grabbed my phone and shot a quick message to the family group chat: "Hey, everyone! Has anyone checked the smoke alarms lately?" Before I knew it, my sister chimed in with her own smoke alarm saga from last month, and my brother added a meme about kitchen disasters. 

While we all had a good laugh, it reminded me of how important it is to have those conversations. Not just about smoke alarms, but about our escape plans and kitchen safety too. I think we all agreed to set a reminder to check our detectors together—safety in numbers, right? 

Have you had a family chat about safety lately? It can be a great bonding moment!
